chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2650 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1.
